app.name: Storybook
app.one_liner: A frontend workshop for building UI components and pages in isolation.

screens.name: Component Workshop
screens.purpose: Display and interact with UI components in isolation with controls, documentation, and testing feedback.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist component state or configuration changes to disk.

mvp_plan: week 1: Initialize isolated component rendering environment
acceptance_tests: User can modify boolean props and see live updates in the preview.
User can view a React component in isolation with default props.
